alts.finalCta: Seniorenpaar bereitet Gemüse in einer sicheren Küche zu

prevention.body: Stürze sind die häufigste Verletzungsursache bei Erwachsenen über 65, und die meisten passieren zu Hause. Die richtigen Anpassungen sind in weniger als einem Tag installiert und können alles verändern.

cards.title: Hausbewertung
cards.desc: Laden Sie Fotos eines beliebigen Raums hoch. Wir erkennen jede Gefahr und geben Ihnen eine persönliche Kostenschätzung, kostenlos und unverbindlich.

cards.title: Professionelle Installation
cards.desc: Zertifizierte Experten passen Ihr gesamtes Zuhause in einem Besuch an: Haltegriffe, rutschfeste Böden, breitere Türen, Beleuchtung und mehr.

cards.title: Smart-Home-Technologie
cards.desc: Sprachsteuerung, smarte Schlösser, Sturzerkennung und 24/7-Notfallalarme, alles ab dem ersten Tag installiert und funktionsfähig.

cards.title: Grant Management
desc: We handle the grant application process on your behalf, including preparing and submitting the required documentation where applicable.
Subject to eligibility, government grants may cover up to 90% of approved home improvement costs.
Grant approval is determined solely by the relevant authority and cannot be guaranteed by Casamia.
cards.termsLink: Learn more about our Grant Terms →
cards.disclaimer: Grant availability, eligibility criteria and funding levels are subject to government policies and may change without notice.

health.title: Gesundheits- und Vitalwertüberwachung
health.desc: Blutdruck, Herzfrequenz, Medikamentenerinnerungen, Familienalarme. Sicherheit, wo immer Sie sind.

gallery.badge: So sieht ein sichereres Zuhause aus
gallery.title: Sehen Sie den Unterschied.

items.title: Sicherheit im Bad
items.desc: Haltegriffe, rutschfeste Oberflächen, zugängliche Dusche, erhöhter Toilettensitz.

items.name: Essential

features: €89 in-home assessment credited toward your plan

items.name: Advanced

items.name: Premium

grants.title: Der Staat übernimmt bis zu 90%.

eurosafe.desc: Engagiert für weniger Unfälle zu Hause und mehr Seniorensicherheit in ganz Europa.

footer.tagline: Wir helfen Familien in ganz Europa, sicher und würdevoll zu Hause älter zu werden.

estimator.errorBody: Wir konnten Ihre Fotos nicht analysieren. Bitte versuchen Sie es erneut oder rufen Sie uns unter +34 900 000 000 an.
estimator.noFiles: Bitte fügen Sie zuerst mindestens ein Foto Ihres Zuhauses hinzu.
estimator.noKey: Fügen Sie VITE_ANTHROPIC_API_KEY zu Ihrer Umgebung hinzu, um die Live-Fotoanalyse zu aktivieren.

result.riskHelper: Based on photos, room risks, mobility profile, urgency, and notes.

howItWorks.title: Ein sichereres Zuhause in drei klaren Schritten.
howItWorks.intro: CasaMia macht den Ablauf einfach: Fotos hochladen, einen maßgeschneiderten Plan erhalten und zertifizierte Installateure die Anpassungen durchführen lassen.

steps.title: Fotos Ihres Zuhauses hochladen
steps.desc: Senden Sie Fotos von Bädern, Küchen, Treppen, Schlafzimmern, Eingängen und Wohnbereichen. Wir suchen nach Gefahren, die häufig Stürze oder Notfallverzögerungen verursachen.

steps.title: Schätzung erhalten
steps.desc: Der Schätzer erkennt Risiken, empfiehlt das passende Paket und zeigt die voraussichtlichen Kosten vor und nach verfügbaren Zuschüssen.

steps.title: Installieren und Zuschüsse einreichen
steps.desc: Unser Team installiert die vereinbarten Anpassungen und verwaltet die Plan-Adapta-Unterlagen, damit Ihre Familie keine Formulare verfolgen muss.

hero.title: Choose the Right Safety Plan for Your Home
hero.subtitle: Whether you need expert guidance, practical home modifications, or smart safety technology, CasaMia helps you create a safer and more comfortable home for aging in place.

explainer.title: Three clear ways to start
explainer.body: Start with clarity, move into practical adaptations, or add connected technology for extra reassurance. Every path begins with understanding the home first.

plans.cardsTitle: Choose the level of support you need.
plans.cardsIntro: Each plan is designed around a different family need: advice only, practical safety improvements, or a more connected aging-in-place setup.

cards.name: Home Assessment Plan
cards.description: An expert room-by-room inspection of your home with a clear safety report and personalized recommendations.
cards.bestFor: Families who want expert clarity before starting any work.

cards.name: Home Safety Plan
cards.description: Assessment plus professional installation of essential safety features and home modifications.
cards.bestFor: Seniors who need practical safety improvements at home.
deliverables: Bathroom, stairway, entryway, and kitchen adaptations where needed

cards.name: Smart Safety Plan
cards.description: Full home safety improvements combined with smart technology for added monitoring, alerts, and peace of mind.
cards.bestFor: Families who want extra reassurance and connected aging-in-place support.

comparison.title: Compare Plans
comparison.intro: Use this table to see what each plan includes before requesting an in-home assessment.

payment.title: Simple & Transparent Payment Terms
payment.body: We keep payments clear and fair. Assessment services are paid at booking. For installation plans, you pay 50% to get started and 50% only upon completion and customer acceptance.

items.title: Home Safety Plan
items.body: 50% deposit upon quotation acceptance, 50% upon completion and customer acceptance.

items.title: Smart Safety Plan
items.body: 50% deposit upon quotation acceptance, 50% upon completion, system commissioning, and customer acceptance.

payment.reassurance: No hidden fees. No work begins without your approval. You receive a clear proposal before installation.

next.title: What Happens After You Choose a Plan?

steps.title: We contact you
steps.body: A CasaMia representative gets in touch to understand your needs and schedule the visit.

steps.title: We assess your home
steps.body: Our qualified safety team performs a room-by-room inspection and identifies risks.

steps.title: You receive a proposal
steps.body: We provide clear recommendations, pricing, and next steps before any work begins.

steps.title: We deliver the solution
steps.body: If you approve, our team coordinates products, installers, and final handover.

faq.title: Questions families ask before choosing a plan.

items.question: Which plan should I choose?
items.answer: If you are unsure, start with the free online safety report. If you need a professional visit, CasaMia will confirm the in-home assessment fee before booking.

items.question: Is the online safety report really free?
items.answer: Yes. The online photo-based safety report is free. A professional in-home assessment visit costs €89, credited toward your CasaMia plan if you proceed.

items.question: Do I have to proceed with installation after the assessment?
items.answer: No. You receive recommendations first, then decide what feels right for the home and family.

items.question: Are installers insured?
items.answer: CasaMia works with trusted installation partners and structures projects around insured professional work.

items.question: When do I pay?
items.answer: Assessment-only services are paid at booking. Installation plans use a clear 50% deposit and 50% final payment after completion and customer acceptance.

items.question: Can the plan be customized?
items.answer: Yes. The final scope is tailored to the home, the resident, and the safety priorities found during assessment.

items.question: Do you support smart safety devices?
items.answer: Yes. The Smart Safety Plan can include sensors, emergency response devices, smart lighting, access devices, and setup support where appropriate.

items.question: What happens after the work is completed?
items.answer: We complete a handover, confirm the customer accepts the work, and explain any support options for future needs.

final.title: Start with the right plan for a safer home.
final.body: Request a €89 in-home assessment visit and let CasaMia help you decide the safest, clearest next step.

grants.title: Zuschusshilfe ohne Papierkram-Labyrinth.
grants.intro: Plan Adapta kann einen erheblichen Teil der Barrierefreiheitsarbeiten abdecken. CasaMia bereitet den Antrag vor, reicht ihn ein und verfolgt ihn für Sie.
eligibility: Das Zuhause liegt in Spanien und benötigt Verbesserungen bei Barrierefreiheit oder Sicherheit.
Die dort lebende Person ist über 65, hat Mobilitätsbedarf oder eine anerkannte Behinderung.
Die Arbeiten verbessern die tägliche Sicherheit: Bäder, Treppen, Zugänge, Türen, Beleuchtung oder Notfallsysteme.
process: Erfassung der erforderlichen Angaben zu Zuhause und Bewohner.
Einreichung beim passenden Zuschusskanal und Nachverfolgung.

contact.title: Sprechen Sie mit CasaMia.
contact.intro: Erzählen Sie uns vom Zuhause, und wir helfen Ihnen, den sichersten nächsten Schritt zu wählen.
contact.success: Vielen Dank. CasaMia meldet sich in Kürze.

planDetail.paymentReassurance: No hidden fees. No unexpected costs.
planDetail.finalTitle: Ready to make your home safer?
planDetail.finalBody: Request a €89 in-home assessment visit and receive personalised recommendations from our qualified safety experts.

plans.title: Home Assessment Plan
plans.subtitle: A qualified home safety inspection that helps families understand risks, priorities and next steps before starting any work.
who: Families who want clarity before committing to adaptations
Seniors wishing to age in place safely
People recovering from surgery or a health event
Individuals with reduced mobility or new accessibility needs
plans.includedIntro: A focused professional assessment before any installation decisions are made.

included.title: Qualified Home Safety Inspection
included.body: A trained CasaMia safety specialist reviews the home with fall risk, access, lighting and daily movement in mind.

included.title: Room-by-Room Assessment
included.body: Bathrooms, kitchens, bedrooms, living spaces, entrances and stairs are reviewed in a practical sequence.

included.title: Fall Risk Evaluation
included.body: We identify trip hazards, slippery surfaces, poor lighting, unstable supports and unsafe movement paths.

included.title: Accessibility Review
included.body: We check whether daily routines can be completed comfortably with current mobility and support needs.

included.title: Personalised Safety Report
included.body: You receive a clear written report that explains the priority risks and recommended improvements.

included.title: Recommendations
included.body: CasaMia explains which adaptations matter first, which are optional and what to consider later.

rooms.title: Bathroom
rooms.body: Review slip risk, grab bar placement, shower access, toilet height and safe movement in wet areas.

rooms.title: Kitchen
rooms.body: Check reach, lighting, floor safety, appliance access and daily task flow.

rooms.title: Bedroom
rooms.body: Assess bed access, night lighting, floor clearance and safer night-time routes.

rooms.title: Living Room
rooms.body: Review furniture layout, rug edges, seating height, cable hazards and movement space.

rooms.title: Stairways
rooms.body: Evaluate rails, treads, lighting, step contrast and safe support points.

rooms.title: Entrance
rooms.body: Check thresholds, doors, mats, lighting, key access and visitor entry routines.

rooms.title: Outdoor Areas
rooms.body: Look at paths, steps, handholds, lighting and weather-related slip risk.

process.title: Home Assessment
process.body: We inspect the home, listen to the family and identify practical safety priorities.

process.title: Proposal & Approval
process.body: You receive a clear report and recommendations before deciding what to do next.

process.title: Professional Installation & Handover
process.body: If you proceed, CasaMia coordinates the right products, installers and final walkthrough.

deliverables: Clear proposal if improvements are needed

payment.note: The assessment is a standalone service. You decide afterwards whether to proceed with any recommended work.

faqs.question: Do I have to proceed with installation?
faqs.answer: No. The assessment gives you clarity first. You can decide later whether to proceed with any recommended adaptations.

faqs.question: How long does the inspection take?
faqs.answer: Most visits take around 60 to 90 minutes, depending on the size of the home and the number of areas reviewed.

faqs.question: Will I receive a written report?
faqs.answer: Yes. You receive a clear report with risks, priorities and recommended next steps.

faqs.question: Can family members attend?
faqs.answer: Yes. We encourage family members or caregivers to join so everyone understands the recommendations.

plans.title: Home Safety Plan
plans.subtitle: Professional home modifications that help seniors live safely, independently and comfortably at home.
who: Seniors wishing to age in place
plans.includedIntro: Everything in the Home Assessment Plan, plus practical safety products and professional installation.

included.title: Everything in Home Assessment
included.body: Qualified inspection, room-by-room review, fall risk evaluation and written recommendations are included first.

included.title: Grab Bars
included.body: Secure support points in bathrooms, corridors or other high-risk areas where balance support is needed.

included.title: Handrails
included.body: Stable rails for stairs, entrances or transitional spaces to make movement safer.

included.title: Anti-slip Flooring
included.body: Anti-slip surfaces, mats or treads in wet, smooth or high-traffic zones.

included.title: Bathroom Improvements
included.body: Support bars, safer shower access, toilet support, slip reduction and safer fixtures where needed.

included.title: Kitchen Improvements
included.body: Safer reach, lighting, access, surfaces and layout recommendations for daily tasks.

included.title: Stairway Safety
included.body: Treads, rails, lighting and visual contrast to reduce stair-related risk.

included.title: Entryway Improvements
included.body: Threshold, lighting, mat, door and access improvements for safer arrivals and exits.

included.title: Furniture Anchoring
included.body: Secure unstable furniture and improve layout to reduce trip, tip and obstruction risks.

included.title: Professional Installation
included.body: CasaMia coordinates trusted installers and completes a customer acceptance walkthrough.

rooms.title: Bathroom
rooms.body: Install grab bars, reduce slip risk, improve shower access and make toilet transfers safer.

rooms.title: Kitchen
rooms.body: Improve reach, lighting, anti-slip surfaces and access around daily cooking routines.

rooms.title: Bedroom
rooms.body: Improve safe bed access, night lighting, furniture clearance and emergency reach points.

rooms.title: Living Room
rooms.body: Rework furniture flow, secure rugs, manage cables and create safer walking paths.

rooms.title: Stairways
rooms.body: Add or improve handrails, treads, lighting and step contrast for safer movement.

rooms.title: Entrance
rooms.body: Adapt thresholds, mats, lighting, doors and support points for safer entry and exit.

rooms.title: Outdoor Areas
rooms.body: Address exterior steps, rails, path lighting and weather-related slip risk.

process.title: Home Assessment
process.body: We inspect the home and identify the practical adaptations that should come first.

process.title: Proposal & Approval
process.body: You approve the recommended scope and pricing before any installation begins.

process.title: Professional Installation & Handover
process.body: Trusted installers complete the work and CasaMia walks you through the finished improvements.

payment.note: You see the scope before work begins and only pay the final balance after the completed work is reviewed.

faqs.question: How long do installations take?
faqs.answer: Many safety upgrades can be completed in a day, while larger adaptation scopes depend on the home and selected products.

faqs.question: Who carries out the work?
faqs.answer: CasaMia coordinates trusted installation partners who understand senior safety, access and respectful in-home work.

faqs.question: Are products guaranteed?
faqs.answer: Products are selected for quality and durability, with manufacturer warranties where applicable.

faqs.question: Can I choose which recommendations to proceed with?
faqs.answer: Yes. You approve the final scope before any installation work begins.

plans.title: Smart Safety Plan
plans.subtitle: A connected safety setup that combines home adaptations, smart devices and family reassurance for aging in place.
who: Seniors who benefit from alerts and connected support
Homes where movement, water, smoke or access risks need monitoring
Caregivers who want a smarter safety layer after physical adaptations
plans.includedIntro: Everything in the Home Safety Plan, plus smart safety technology, setup and user training.

included.title: Everything in Home Safety
included.body: Assessment, practical adaptations, installation coordination and customer acceptance are included first.

included.title: Smart Lighting
included.body: Motion or schedule-based lighting to reduce night-time risk and make daily movement easier.

included.title: Motion Sensors
included.body: Sensors that support safer routines and can help families understand movement patterns.

included.title: Water Leak Sensors
included.body: Leak detection in kitchens, bathrooms or utility areas where water risk matters.

included.title: Smoke Detection
included.body: Connected smoke detection options to support earlier alerts and family awareness.

included.title: Smart Doorbells
included.body: Visitor communication and access support that reduces rushed movement to the entrance.

included.title: Emergency Response Devices
included.body: Wearable or wall-mounted call options to keep help easier to reach.

included.title: Health Monitoring Setup
included.body: Support for compatible monitoring devices where the family wants an added layer of insight.

included.title: Smart Home Configuration
included.body: CasaMia configures compatible devices, routines and alerts around the home setup.

included.title: User Training
included.body: We explain the system clearly so seniors and family members know how to use it.

rooms.title: Bathroom
rooms.body: Combine grip support with leak alerts, motion lighting and safer water-use routines.

rooms.title: Kitchen
rooms.body: Add leak alerts, lighting, smart plugs or appliance safety support where appropriate.

rooms.title: Bedroom
rooms.body: Use bedside emergency devices, night lighting and routines that support safer movement after dark.

rooms.title: Living Room
rooms.body: Configure lighting, voice control and emergency access around the main daily living space.

rooms.title: Stairways
rooms.body: Improve lighting, hand support and movement awareness in one of the highest-risk areas.

rooms.title: Entrance
rooms.body: Use smart doorbells, access devices, lighting and safer entry routines.

rooms.title: Outdoor Areas
rooms.body: Support exterior movement with lighting, access checks and monitoring where useful.

process.title: Home Assessment
process.body: We review both physical risks and the home connectivity needed for smart safety devices.

process.title: Proposal & Approval
process.body: You approve the adaptations, devices, setup requirements and pricing before work begins.

process.title: Professional Installation & Handover
process.body: CasaMia installs, configures, commissions and trains the household on the final system.

deliverables: Premium safety products and smart devices

terms: 50% upon completion, commissioning and customer acceptance.
payment.note: Final payment is only due after the system has been installed, configured and accepted by the customer.

faqs.question: Can I control everything from my phone?
faqs.answer: Many devices can be controlled from a phone when compatible, but CasaMia keeps the setup practical and easy to use.

faqs.question: Do smart devices require Wi-Fi?
faqs.answer: Most smart devices require reliable Wi-Fi or connectivity. We review this during the assessment before recommending devices.

faqs.question: Will you train me to use the system?
faqs.answer: Yes. Training and handover are part of the Smart Safety Plan.

faqs.question: Can additional devices be added later?
faqs.answer: Yes. The system can usually be expanded later as needs change, subject to compatibility.

terms.title: Terms & Conditions
terms.intro: Important terms for CasaMia services, support and grant-management assistance.

grantManagement.title: Grant Management Terms
grantManagement.body: Casamia provides grant management assistance as an administrative service only.
services: Submitting applications on behalf of customers
Liaising with the relevant authority where authorised
important: Grant approval is entirely at the discretion of the relevant authority.
Casamia cannot guarantee approval or eligibility.
Estimated grant percentages are indicative only.
Customers remain responsible for providing accurate information.
Casamia is not responsible for delays or decisions made by the granting authority.

hero.title: Book a Professional In-Home Safety Assessment
hero.subtitle: Request a €89 CasaMia home visit to review fall risks, accessibility needs, and practical improvements before you choose any work.
hero.reassurance: The €89 visit fee is credited toward your CasaMia plan if you proceed.
hero.panelTitle: A €89 expert visit, credited if you continue.
hero.panelBody: We confirm availability and scope before the appointment so there are no surprises.

pricing.title: Paid visit, credited toward your plan
pricing.body: In-home assessments require travel and specialist time, so the visit costs €89. If you proceed with a CasaMia package, the assessment fee is credited toward your plan.
points: Free online safety report available first
€89 credited if you proceed with a package

items.title: Identify hidden fall risks
items.body: Spot small hazards that are easy to miss but can lead to slips, trips, or avoidable accidents.

items.title: Improve safety and comfort
items.body: Understand which changes can make movement easier, calmer, and more secure.

items.title: Support independent living
items.body: Create a safer home environment that helps seniors keep daily routines with confidence.

items.title: Get expert recommendations
items.body: Receive practical guidance from people who understand aging-in-place safety.

items.title: Plan home modifications with confidence
items.body: Know what matters first before choosing equipment, installation, or package level.

items.title: Peace of mind for the whole family
items.body: Give relatives a clearer picture of the home and the next safest step.

included.title: What's Included in the In-Home Assessment
included.body: A focused home safety visit designed to give you clear, useful next steps before any installation decision.

items.title: Room-by-room safety inspection
items.body: We review the spaces where daily movement, transfers, and routines happen.

items.title: Fall-risk and accessibility review
items.body: We look at common risk points such as slippery surfaces, poor lighting, steps, and access.

items.title: Bathroom, stairway, entrance, kitchen, and outdoor safety check
items.body: High-risk zones are checked for practical safety and comfort improvements.

items.title: Personalized recommendations
items.body: Your assessment focuses on the home, the person, and the changes that would help most.

items.title: Clear next-step proposal if improvements are needed
items.body: If adaptations are useful, we explain the recommended scope, products, and next step clearly.

items.title: Request the Visit
items.body: Share the home location, preferred timing, selected plan, and any concerns.

items.title: We Confirm Availability
items.body: CasaMia confirms the appointment, the €89 visit fee, and what will be reviewed before booking.

items.title: You Receive Recommendations
items.body: After the visit, you receive clear guidance on risks, priorities, and next steps.

formSection.title: Request Your In-Home Assessment Visit
formSection.body: Tell us where the home is and how you prefer to be contacted. A CasaMia representative will confirm availability and a suitable appointment time for the €89 visit.

form.title: In-home assessment request
form.intro: Fields marked with * are required. Please provide either a phone number or email address.
form.success: Thank you. Your request has been received. A CasaMia representative will contact you shortly to confirm availability and an appointment time for the €89 assessment visit.
form.error: We couldn't submit your request. Please try again or contact CasaMia by phone.
form.consent: I agree to be contacted by Casamia regarding my in-home safety assessment request.
form.privacy: Your information is only used to arrange your assessment visit. We never sell your data.

errors.name: Please enter your full name.
errors.contact: Please enter a phone number or email address.
errors.city: Please enter your city or area.
errors.consent: Please agree to be contacted about your assessment request.

form.successWithPlan: Thank you. Your {{plan}} visit request has been received. A Casamia representative will contact you shortly to confirm availability and an appointment time for the €89 assessment visit.
